hero.tag: A simple and versatile group intelligence engine
hero.desc1: Even with just a piece of text,
hero.desc2: can automatically generate a parallel world of up to a
hero.desc4: based on the real-world seeds within. Inject variables from a God's perspective to find the
hero.slogan: Let the future be rehearsed among Agent groups, and let decisions prevail after a hundred battles

status.title: System Status
status.desc: Prediction engine is on standby, multiple unstructured data can be uploaded to initialize the simulation sequence

workflow.title: Workflow Sequence
workflow.step1_desc: Reality seed extraction & Individual and group memory injection & GraphRAG construction
workflow.step2_desc: Entity relation extraction & Persona generation & Environment configuration Agent injects simulation parameters
workflow.step3_desc: Dual-platform parallel simulation & Automatic analysis of prediction needs & Dynamic update of time-series memory
workflow.step4_desc: ReportAgent has a rich toolset to interact deeply with the post-simulation environment
workflow.step5_desc: Dialogue with any individual in the simulated world & Dialogue with ReportAgent

console.upload_title: Drag and drop files to upload
console.upload_hint: Or click to browse file system
console.prompt_placeholder: // Enter simulation or prediction requirements in natural language (e.g., What public opinion trends would be triggered if Wuhan University announced the revocation of Xiao's punishment)

modal.playback_hint: Step3 'Start Simulation' & Step5 'Deep Interaction' must be initiated during runtime and do not support history playback

graph.title: Real-time Knowledge Graph
graph.waiting_hint: Graph construction will start automatically upon completion

build.title: Build Process
build.phase1_desc: After uploading documents, LLM analyzes the content to automatically generate an ontology (entity types + relation types) suitable for public opinion simulation.
build.phase2_desc: Based on the generated ontology, documents are chunked to call the Zep API to build the knowledge graph, extracting entities and relations.
build.phase2_waiting: Waiting for ontology generation to complete...

process.no_files_error: No files to upload, please return to the homepage and try again.

graph_panel.title: Graph Relationship Visualization
graph_panel.simulating_hint: GraphRAG long-term and short-term memory is updating in real-time
graph_panel.finished_hint: A small amount of content is still being processed, it is recommended to manually refresh the graph later
graph_panel.name: Name
